batch_9_summary.domain: DDR redo with improved harness — Batch 7 items 4-8 redone for quality uplift

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_PnL
objects.notes: Daily P&L fact. SUM(UnrealizedPnLChange), SUM(NetProfit), COUNT(PositionID) from Function_PnL_Single_Day. 9-dimensional GROUP BY (CID x InstrumentType x 7 flags). 8.8B rows. ~111 lines. Redo: added lineage.md, computation formulas, mechanical tier2 assignments.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms
objects.notes: Unified MIMO across 4 platforms (TP, eMoney, Options, MoneyFarm). UNION ALL sub-platform tables + global FTD JOIN + FTD recovery UPDATEs + C2USD UPDATE. 91.5M rows. ~422 lines. Redo: improved dual-FTD logic documentation, IBAN rename clarity.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_MIMO_eMoney_Platform
objects.notes: eMoney (IBAN) deposits/withdrawals from eMoney_Fact_Transaction_Status. TxTypeID classification (7=deposit, 5=internal, 14=C2F, 8=trade, 6=internal out). Dedup by TransactionID. FTD recovery UPDATE. 23.2M rows. ~228 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions
objects.notes: Master revenue fact table — 18 distinct metrics from 16+ Function_Revenue_* TVFs. Three insertion strategies: daily, Options full reload, Staking monthly lag. -1 sentinel convention (not 0). Position enrichment: IBAN, Recurring, CopyFund, C2P. 3.1B rows. ~1709 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_Trading_Volumes_And_Amounts
objects.notes: Trading volume/invested amounts from Function_Trading_Volume_PositionLevel. GROUP BY 14 dimensions, SUM 9 measures. QA dump to BI_DB_VolumeQA. IsOpenedFromIBAN DDL as varchar(100) anomaly noted. 793M rows. ~200 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_AUM
objects.notes: Multi-platform AUM aggregation: TP equity, IBAN balance, Options equity, MoneyFarm equity. FULL OUTER JOIN across 4 sources. Global + TP-specific totals. Sources: BI_DB_Client_Balance_CID_Level_New, V_Liabilities, Function_AUM_OptionsPlatform, MoneyFarm_Fact_AccountsDaily. ~195 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_MIMO_Options_Platform
objects.notes: Options (Apex) platform deposits/withdrawals. Simple TRUNCATE+INSERT from Function_MIMO_Options_Platform. Hardcoded USD-only, FundingTypeID=0, CurrencyID=1. OrigIdentifier always 'ApexTxID'. ~30 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_MIMO_Trading_Platform
objects.notes: TP deposits/withdrawals with multi-currency support. Complex multi-source: Fact_CustomerAction, Fact_BillingDeposit, Fact_BillingWithdraw, Dim_Currency. UNION deposits+withdrawals with dedup. Post-insert FTD recovery UPDATE from Dim_Customer. Flags: IBAN, Recurring, C2F, Redeem. ~350 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_Non_Revenue_Generating_Actions
objects.notes: Engagement/operational actions (logins, registrations, verifications, copy). Aggregated from Fact_CustomerAction + Dim_ActionType + Dim_CompensationReason. Complex action-type classification via CASE mapping. IsCopyFund detection via Dim_Mirror workaround. Depositor login split. ~200 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status
objects.notes: Central customer segmentation snapshot — one row per CID per day. 5-layer population build (TP, IBAN-only, Options-only, Options MIMO, MoneyFarm). Platform-specific FTD flags, daily MIMO flags with coercion, account segmentation (active/balance-only/portfolio-only/inactive). 13.3B rows. ~1250 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Customer_Periodic_Status
objects.notes: Pre-aggregation of Customer_Daily_Status for dashboard performance. Rolling periods: ThisWeek/ThisMonth/ThisQuarter/ThisYear. Semantics: MAX for snapshot attrs (latest-day), MAX for activity flags (ever-happened), SUM for event counts, special IsFunded logic (last-day). 12.7B rows. ~460 lines.

batch_7_summary.domain: Mixed priority 60-90: Futures, Interest, UsageTracking + 5 DDR fact tables

ddr_domain_knowledge.fact_tables: PnL, MIMO (AllPlatforms/eMoney/Trading/Options), Revenue, Trading Volumes, AUM, Non-Revenue Actions — all feed DDR_CID_Level or are standalone DDR components
ddr_domain_knowledge.customer_tables: Customer_Daily_Status (daily snapshot, 64 cols, 13.3B rows) → Customer_Periodic_Status (pre-agg, 130 cols, 12.7B rows) — population & segmentation backbone
ddr_domain_knowledge.auxiliary_pattern: Separate CID_Level_Aux + Daily_Aggregated_Aux tables for fees added post-initial design
ddr_domain_knowledge.revenue_functions: 18+ Function_Revenue_* functions are the foundational building blocks. Each calculates a specific revenue metric.
ddr_domain_knowledge.mimo_platforms: Trading Platform, eMoney (IBAN), Options (Gatsby/Apex), MoneyFarm — each has a dedicated fact table feeding into AllPlatforms union
ddr_domain_knowledge.population_sources: 5 mutually exclusive: TP (Fact_CustomerAction), IBAN-only (eMoney_Fact_Account_Status), Options-only (Gatsby_Fact_Account_Status), Options MIMO (DDR_Fact_MIMO_Options_Platform), MoneyFarm (MoneyFarm_Fact_AccountsDaily)
ddr_domain_knowledge.unique_user_caveat: Time-range aggregations attribute users to last day's dimension values
ddr_domain_knowledge.datasource_pattern: TimeRange table uses DataSource column to partition standard vs auxiliary data
ddr_domain_knowledge.aum_sources: 4 pillars: TP equity (Client_Balance_CID_Level_New), IBAN balance (V_Liabilities), Options equity (Function_AUM_OptionsPlatform), MoneyFarm equity (MoneyFarm_Fact_AccountsDaily)

target_objects: BI_DB_DDR_CID_Level (P60) — key bridge table from fact tables to aggregated layers
next_batch_plan.notes: DDR aggregation pyramid tables — the core DDR reporting chain. These complete the DDR domain documentation.
